violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (nursing ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Ice disposed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Pancakes were observed cooling in a tightly wrapped pan in the walk-in cooler. PIC placed in freezer to rapidly chill. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025

A clean and sanitized blender bowl was observed with an accumulation of water. Dishes and utensils must be allowed to air dry before storing. PIC brought item to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025
The nursing ice machine was in poor repair, observed leaking. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -skillet -stand mixer -floor fan -blender bases -nursing ice machine. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2025
The rear prep sink was not in good repair. Inspector observed a pan of water under the drain, with the drainpipe leaning to the side. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2025
The walk-in freezer was observed in poor repair, with ice accumulation around door and under threshold. PIC stated management is aware and addressing issue. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the (ice machine) have a small accumulation of debris. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2024
Inspector observed leakage the plumbing under 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the (food storage ) area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machines) were observed with an accumulation of black residue and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. All three units taken out of service to be thoroughly cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2023
